violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils can opener and slicer were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. The can opener and deli slicer were cleaned and sanitized during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/25/2025

The presence of small flies is not controlled as evidenced by live activity in the dry storage rooms in the kitchen. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 11/25/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the third-floor air circulating fan have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to prevent the accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 11/25/2025

The floor and wall junctures in the third-floor kitchen do not have coving behind the 3-bay sink and dishwasher. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 05/25/2026

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by droppings. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Establishment is to continue working with pest control services. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/07/2024

The door to the outside, located in the receiving area and parking garage door and hallway door leading to the parking garage, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Establishment is to evaluate all outside entry doors for proper fitment and adjust or replace weather stripping and door sweeps. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/05/2024

he presence of small flies is not controlled as evidenced by live activity. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Establishment is to work with pest control to remedy small fly presence in kitchen. New Violation. Establishment is to continue working with pest control services. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/07/2024

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by dropping throughout the facility and gnawed food products. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Establishment is to increase pest control services and have pest control complete and provide a written action plan to establishment and inspector on measures to be taken to eradicate rodent activity within the facility. Establishment is to sanitize all adulterated surfaces. New Violation. Correct By: 10/29/2024

The door to the outside, located in the receiving area and parking garage door and hallway door leading to the parking garage, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Establishment is to evaluate all outside entry doors for proper fitment and adjust or replace weather stripping and door sweeps. New Violation. Correct By: 11/05/2024

The presence of small flies is not controlled as evidenced by live activity. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Establishment is to work with pest control to remedy small fly presence in kitchen. New Violation. Correct By: 10/29/2024
The faucet for the 3-bay sink was observed to be leaking. Plumbing fixtures and systems shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/12/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (Deli slicer) was observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the flooring in dry storage was observed to have an accumulation of unidentifiable debris, dust and food debris. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2023

The coving behind cook line in 3rd floor kitchen was observed coming off from wall. Coving shall be repaired. Flooring in 3rd floor kitchen was observed to be cracked and splitting near dish machine. Water was observed under flooring. Flooring shall be repaired. Broken wall tiles in basement level kitchen dish room area were observed. Tiles shall be repaired. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/01/2024
